description: Worker-Mode delegation hooks. Enforcement here is backend-routing, not write-blocking. (1) PreToolUse enforce-backend: physically blocks Task calls routed to the wrong backend (deny wrong-backend dispatch + marker-based legacy fallback guard after OMC failure) and injects subagent output limits before Task/Agent dispatch. (2) PostToolUseFailure detect-omc-failure: writes omc-failure.marker when a Task call errors, so enforce-backend can block silent auto-fallback to legacy. (3) SubagentStop record-worker: pure observer, appends one JSONL record per worker. (4) SessionStart check-config: non-blocking WORKER_LOG_PATH reminder. (5) PostToolUse spool-tool-output: observer, spools Bash/Read/Grep output. Write/Edit delegation is enforced structurally via tool-stripping the orchestrator (coordinator.md tools allowlist has no Write/Edit/MultiEdit), not via these hooks.
